nasb.text: It came about when he had arrived, that he blew the trumpet in the hill country of Ephraim; and the sons of Israel went down with him from the hill country, and he was in front of them.

esv.text: When he arrived, he sounded the trumpet in the hill country of Ephraim. Then the people of Israel went down with him from the hill country, and he was their leader.

cnv.text: 他去到以後，就在以法蓮山地吹角；以色列人與他一同從山地上下來，他走在他們前頭，

ccb.text: 到了那里，他就在以法莲的山区吹响号角，召集以色列人。众人跟随以笏下山，
